title: Kenya and Somalia: Call for bids for the provision of media monitoring services
body: "On behalf of the Secretary of State for the Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office, the British High Commission (BHC) in Nairobi is seeking for the provision of media monitoring services for the British High Commission Nairobi & British Embassy Mogadishu. We are therefore looking for a supplier that has the relevant professional skills, experience, technical resources and financial capability to provide comprehensive media monitoring services.  Full details on the requirements, including instructions for interested bidders and registration are available via the FCDO’s e-Procurement portal, which requires registration. Registering is quick, easy, free and is the only way in which one is able to review the tender documents  Competent and financially stable suppliers are invited to access the invitation to tender documents by following these steps:   Open the https://fco.bravosolution.co.uk website, register and sign in Navigate to provision of media monitoring services for the British High Commission Nairobi & British Embassy Mogadishu CPG/12783/2025. ITT 7203. Project 12783   Contact the Regional Procurement Manager; Thabang.Mokoena@fcdo.gov.uk for any queries. Kindly note that the responses are required to be in English.   Deadlines  Please note that the invitation to tender documents should be completed and uploaded on the BRAVOSolution e-Procurement Portal by 15:00 EAT on 19 August 2025.   Disclaimer  The BHC will not meet any expenses incurred in preparing your invitation to tender documents. "
